title: narcissus exertus
intro: Narcissus exertus, also known as the 'Cretan Daffodil' or 'Cretan Narcissus', is a bulbous perennial plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant contains alkaloids like galantamine and lycorine, which possess medicinal properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The medicinal properties and health benefits of Narcissus exertus include its potential to improve cognitive function, alleviate symptoms of Alzheimer's disease, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also utilized in the production of pharmaceuticals like galantamine, which is used to treat dementia and Alzheimer's disease.
